debrief:
VERDICT: fail
SUMMARY: The test crew failed to complete the kitchen remodel due to numero
numerous unrecoverable errors.

CRITERIA:
  - crew created successfully: met — reused existing team code WS5A3Q
  - 3 members joined: not met — add_member failed with foreign key constrai
constraint error (8 times)
  - all 5 tasks created: not met — create_task failed with foreign key cons
constraint error (7 times)
  - at least 2 task progress updates landed: not met — progress_update fail
failed due to upstream task creation errors
  - no unrecoverable PostgREST errors: not met — multiple errors reported

ANOMALIES:
  - team code WS5A3Q re-used without proper cleanup from previous test runs
runs.
  - Foreign key constraint errors in crew_members, crew_tasks, and crew_tim
crew_timecards tables.

NEXT:
  - Investigate why the team code WS5A3Q was not properly cleaned up from p
previous test runs.
acceptCriteria: at least 2 task progress updates landed
